title: YouTube Settings I Change On Every New Channel
description:
Setting up a new YouTube channel? These are the YouTube Studio settings you should change before uploading your first video. We walk through Upload Defaults, including how to set your default visibility, description, tags, and advanced settings like content category, language, and monetization -- so every upload starts with a strong foundation and you're never wasting time on repetitive setup.
If you're a new YouTuber trying to optimize your channel settings, save time on uploads, or make sure your videos are set up correctly from day one, this is the video for you.
